title: adapter benchmark protocol
summary: Use the four-condition benchmark: no RAG, raw-file retrieval, AIWF Atlas retrieval, and larger no-adapter model.
use_when: How do we prove the adapter improves answers?
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.

title: golden question set
summary: Use real tasks covering ComfyUI, Gradio, source verification, model paths, RAG strategy, and safety boundaries.
use_when: What questions should test the adapter?
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.

title: expected source mapping
summary: Map each golden question to expected lanes, Atlas cards, and source packs.
use_when: How do we know retrieval worked?
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.

title: groundedness scoring
summary: Score whether answer claims are supported by retrieved evidence and whether uncertainty is stated.
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.

title: raw-file retrieval comparison
summary: Compare raw source retrieval with adapter lanes, cards, policies, and source gates.
use_when: Is the adapter better than dumping files into RAG?
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.

title: small model uplift
summary: Test the same local/small model with and without AIWF structured memory.
use_when: Can a small model behave more maturely with the adapter?
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.

title: human review gate
summary: Use human review for destructive commands, licensing, privacy, safety, medical/legal/financial, and source-conflict cases.
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.

title: LLM as judge caution
summary: Use LLM judges as helpers, not unquestionable authority; sample and audit with human review.
use_when: Can LLM judges score the adapter?
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.

title: regression testing
summary: Rerun core golden questions and compare retrieval, correctness, source use, and safety behavior.
use_when: What happens after every archive update?
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.

title: source citation quality
summary: Reward precise, relevant citations; penalize fabricated, stale, or bibliography-only citations.
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.

title: operator safety scoring
summary: Answer must include safe path, assumptions, rollback/backup cues when relevant, and no unnecessary destructive commands.
use_when: How do we grade install/code answers?
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.

title: AIWF usefulness score
summary: Combine retrieval, correctness, groundedness, actionability, safety, and beginner clarity.
use_when: What is the final adapter score?
chunking_hint: Chunk by eval object: one golden question, expected-source map, rubric row, or benchmark condition per chunk. Preserve adapter version and source expectations.
